title: Skill-Lab Skill IR Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a Skill-Lab skill IR file (SKILL.md). Validates structure of skill metadata, inputs/outputs, capability requirements, composition references, and provenance.

schema_version.description: IR schema version this skill conforms to. Pinned per file so the compiler can accept the current version and one back.

name.description: Skill name in kebab-case. Unique within a Desk.

description.description: Single-paragraph description used for activation matching by host orchestrators.

version.description: Skill version in semver form (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Used by the registry for dependency resolution.

desk.description: Desk this skill belongs to, in kebab-case.

lifecycle_stage.description: Optional lifecycle stage assignment for Desks with sequential lifecycle shapes (e.g., SDLC). Tool-routed Desks (e.g., GitHub Command Desk) may omit this.

role.description: Skill role within its Desk. 'router' is the top-of-house skill; 'orchestrator' is a Desk command desk; 'leaf' is a lifecycle/capability skill.

inputs.description: Typed inputs the skill consumes. The orchestrator preflight verifies required inputs are available before invocation.

outputs.description: Artifacts the skill produces. Each output has a stable id and a target filename.

connectors_required.description: Connectors that must be wired for the skill to run. Missing required connectors trigger a connector diagnostic and halt.

connectors_optional.description: Connectors the skill uses opportunistically when available. Missing optional connectors do not block execution.

composes_from.description: Upstream skills this skill consumes outputs from. May reference skills within the same Desk or in other Desks. Version constraints follow semver range syntax.

hands_off_to.description: Downstream skills this skill hands off to. May reference skills within the same Desk or in other Desks.

capability_requirements.description: Capabilities the skill needs from its host target. The compiler refuses to emit for targets that cannot satisfy 'required' capabilities.

activation_hints.description: Natural-language phrases that should activate this skill. Used to seed Custom GPT conversation starters and other target activation surfaces.

provenance.description: Authorship, source attribution, and license. Required for supply-chain auditability.

policy_ref.description: Optional path to a policy.yaml file overriding Desk-level policy for this skill. Resolved relative to the SKILL.md file.

skill_reference.description: Reference to another skill, supporting cross-Desk composition and semver version ranges.

ref.description: Skill reference in @org/desk/skill form, or bare skill name for same-Desk references.

version.description: Semver range expression (e.g., '^1.0.0', '>=1.2.0 <2.0.0'). Defaults to '*' if omitted.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the composition, surfaced in registry views.
